items.summary: Subjective dimension below target: Mid elegance (65.5%)

Subjective dimension below target: Low elegance (68.4%)
Subjective dimension below target: Abstraction fit (64.9%)

narrative.headline: ⚠ 2 security issues — review before other cleanup. All T1 items cleared!

actions.description: 1 boilerplate_duplication issues — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
5 stale_exclude issues — remove stale exclusion or verify it's still needed
2 security issues — review and fix security issues — prioritize by severity

strategy.hint: Work through actions in priority order. Rescan after each fix to track progress.

primary_action.description: 1 boilerplate_duplication issues — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes

narrative.why_now: Work through actions in priority order. Rescan after each fix to track progress.

risk_flags.message: Strict/lenient gap is 0.8 pts with 193 wontfix issues

agent_notes: Do NOT use `desloppify plan skip` unless the user explicitly asks you to skip an item.
If you cannot fix an item, report it and move to the next one.
For cluster items: if the autofix_hint finds 0 results, drill into individual issues with the primary_command.

clusters.name: security
clusters.description: Fix all mechanical security findings

clusters.name: dead-migration-code
clusters.description: Remove dead code from incomplete BlackLab migration: indexer/hybrid/, root LuceneIndexer, .bak files

clusters.name: interface-contract
clusters.description: Fix QueryExecutor interface gap causing forced downcasts to BlackLabQueryExecutor

clusters.name: debug-logging
clusters.description: Replace all System.out.println with SLF4J logger calls

clusters.name: dead-methods
clusters.description: Remove dead methods, stubs, and copy-paste artifacts

clusters.name: resource-management
clusters.description: Fix per-request index opens that bypass injected executor

clusters.description: Add missing tests for centralized abstractions: ExploreResponseBuilder, MultiSeedExplorer, and wrapHandler error classification contracts

clusters.name: stale-excludes
clusters.description: 5 stale_exclude items verified as valid non-source data directories

clusters.name: structural-large
clusters.description: 2 large files already substantially reduced by extraction

clusters.name: dead-ai-code
clusters.description: Delete AI-generated dead code across GrammarConfigLoader, LogDiceCalculator, WordSketchApiServer, SemanticFieldExplorer. Issues: dead copula infrastructure (822833ee), dead grammar config methods (68d46c6f), dead LogDice scoring methods (06443025), RelationDef class (cd282c18), toLegacyRelationType() (2875ee92), duplicate explore() overloads (bff0195f).

clusters.name: api-coherence
clusters.description: Fix API coherence: BCQL error returns HTTP 200 (16250503); extract duplicate relation switch (90d6143d).

clusters.name: abstraction-cleanup
clusters.description: Remove pure delegation in compareCollocateProfiles, cache collocatePosGroup scan, move serialization out of GrammarConfig, extract shared helpers from SemanticFieldExplorer

clusters.name: convention-fixes
clusters.description: Fix convention issues: replace System.out with logger in BlackLabConllUIndexer, convert RelationsValidationTest to JUnit, fix test naming convention (Test prefix), remove debug prefix from logger.debug() calls, make BlackLabSnippetParser public, standardize wildcard imports

clusters.name: migration-cleanup
clusters.description: Clean up incomplete migration artifacts: .bak files, phantom class references in CLAUDE.md, stale javadoc in QueryResults, orphaned SketchGrammarParser and CQL grammar classes, dead predicate subsystem

clusters.name: design-fixes
clusters.description: Fix design defects: double-close bug, stream-to-logger bug, duplicate logDice pipeline (4x in BlackLabQueryExecutor), duplicate derivePosition methods, double query execution, REPITITION typo, duplicate split methods, dual relation lookup API, inconsistent InvalidQuery handling

clusters.name: test-fixes
clusters.description: Fix test infrastructure: RelationsValidationTest uses main() not @Test; LongIntHashMapTest is in wrong package; integration tests use hardcoded paths; CQL verifier has shallow assertions; dummy test has no assertions

clusters.name: package-org
clusters.description: Structural / documentation issues: utils catch-all package, query package blob (too many classes), phantom /api/grammar/active endpoint, README startup commands incomplete, sketch query params undocumented, GrammarConfigLoader god constructor, oversized executeBcqlQuery, god class API server

clusters.name: bugs-first
clusters.description: Fix genuine correctness bugs: multi-seed pattern substitution missing, SimpleTagger 'am' tagged wrong, remaining parseInt sites

clusters.name: quick-wins
clusters.description: Trivial one-liner fixes: remove unused variable, add @Override, remove dead code, fix pom.xml artifact, remove trivial Javadoc

clusters.name: error-handling
clusters.description: Fix error classification in SketchHandlers.java: narrow handleBcqlQueryPost catch to JSONException and IllegalArgumentException so NPE/state errors become 500 not 400, and add pattern complexity/length guard before passing BCQL to executor

clusters.name: stubs-cleanup
clusters.description: Resolve getCorpusSize stub: either implement using BlackLab API or remove and add to interface as not-implemented

clusters.description: Break WordSketchApiServer monolith: extract duplicate handlers, try-with-resources, extract response builder helper

clusters.name: design-structural

clusters.name: deprecated-api-cleanup

clusters.description: Move SemanticFieldExplorer's 6-7 result DTOs to a new model/ package to decouple the api/ layer from query/ internals

clusters.name: nullable-annotations
clusters.description: Add @Nullable annotations to return types and parameters that return/accept null without annotation: HttpApiUtils.requireParam(), ExplorationHandlers.resolveRelationConfig() and resolveExploreParams(), CollocateQueryHelper.buildAndRankCollocates() posMap param

clusters.name: naming-minor
clusters.description: Rename two ambiguous identifiers in BlackLabSnippetParser.java: findLabelPosition to findLabelTokenIndex (return value is 1-based token slot), and LEMMA_ATTR_ANY to LEMMA_ATTR_RELAXED (signals case-insensitivity and quote flexibility)

clusters.name: surface-pattern
clusters.description: Refactor BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern() to use the existing collectFrequenciesFromGroups() helper instead of inlining an identical HitGroups iteration loop — two issue IDs, one refactoring

clusters.name: dead-legacy
clusters.description: Remove or document dead/legacy code: make BlackLabConllUIndexer.indexDirectory() private or add intent Javadoc, audit and remove tag= fallback in RelationConfig.posGroupFromConstraint() if unused, replace array idiom with AtomicReference in Main.java shutdown hook

clusters.name: cors-init
clusters.description: Replace hardcoded initialization constants with configurable values: read CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN from system property in HttpApiUtils.java, and derive NOUN_CQL_CONSTRAINT and ADJECTIVE_PATTERN from RelationConfig.collocateReversePattern() in SemanticFieldExplorer and CollocateProfileComparator

clusters.name: api-params
clusters.description: Fix semantic-field endpoint parameter inconsistencies in ExplorationHandlers.java: standardize 'seed' to 'seeds' across all three endpoints, and return HTTP 400 when nouns_per is sent to multi-seed explore instead of silently ignoring it

clusters.name: grammar-config-reader
clusters.description: Fix resource ownership violation in GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader(): remove try-with-resources around the Reader parameter so the caller retains lifecycle responsibility

clusters.name: sketch-dedup
clusters.description: Eliminate method-level duplication in SketchHandlers and ExplorationHandlers: extract iterateRelations() in SketchHandlers, extract parseBaseExploreRequest() in ExplorationHandlers, and split ExploreOptions into single-seed vs multi-seed variants to remove the inapplicable nounsPerSeed field

clusters.name: test-gaps
clusters.description: Add missing test coverage for two critical untested classes: write ConlluConverterTest covering MWT-skipping, chunk rotation, and sentence-boundary logic; write BlackLabConllUIndexerTest covering error-continuation callback and close-ordering

clusters.name: model-reorg
clusters.description: Reorganize package boundaries: move RelationType/PosGroup from config/ to model/ (domain vocabulary), stage model/ split moving ExploreOptions to exploration/ and Edge/RelationEdgeType to exploration/, extract GrammarConfig value object from GrammarConfigLoader, and move LongIntHashMap to a collections/ package

clusters.name: error-handling-unification
clusters.description: Unify HTTP error handling: wrapHandler sends 500 for IAE, parseQueryParams silently swallows URL decode failures, resolveExploreParams leaks internal Java messages

clusters.name: null-seed-contract

clusters.description: Fix cross-module architectural boundary violations: PatternSubstitution misplaced in api/, and server constructing its own services.

clusters.description: Fix initialization coupling issues: factory methods with side effects and heavy I/O in constructors.

clusters.name: security-notes
clusters.description: Low-priority security and auth notes for this local NLP research tool. Loopback-only server with no external exposure.

clusters.description: API parameter naming and endpoint contract coherence

clusters.description: ExplorationHandlers validation/parse pipeline unification

clusters.description: Model class responsibility boundary and abstraction fitness

clusters.name: stale-cleanup
clusters.description: Dead code, unreachable guards, deprecated aliases removal

clusters.name: type-discipline
clusters.description: Systematic @Nullable/@NonNull annotation coverage and magic-string enums

clusters.name: doc-debt
clusters.description: Inaccurate and incomplete Javadoc corrections

clusters.name: arch-relation-type
clusters.description: RelationType enum split: structural dispatch vs semantic categories (T4 deferred)

clusters.name: explore-response-assembler-move
clusters.description: Move ExploreResponseAssembler from model/ to api/ to fix high_level_elegance (52.6) and package_organization (63.5) regressions

clusters.name: annotation-fixes
clusters.description: Fix @NonNull annotation contradictions and missing @Nullable annotations to recover type_discipline (43.6) and contract_coherence

clusters.name: elegance-smells
clusters.description: Remove mid_level_elegance code smells: dead CORS wrapper, IAE convention inconsistency, multi-pass accumulator, null sentinel, abbreviation

clusters.name: multi-seed-bug
clusters.description: Fix ExplorationResult dual-mode seed field — comma-joined string used as mode discriminant is a functional design bug in the multi-seed edge graph

clusters.name: error-pipeline
clusters.description: Fix error handling inconsistencies — handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti bypasses the established error pipeline; corpus builder and frequency lookup silently swallow errors

clusters.name: ai-debt
clusters.description: Remove LLM-generated defensive boilerplate — redundant @NonNull null checks, phase-restating comments, 78-println showUsage method

clusters.name: api-naming
clusters.description: Standardize QueryExecutor interface verb conventions and fix api_surface_coherence issues — find*/execute* mix and 10-param exploreByPattern

clusters.name: conventions
clusters.description: Normalize accessor style in model package, add missing final modifier to RelationUtils, and fix naming quality violations

clusters.name: options-dedup
clusters.description: Eliminate SingleSeedExplorationOptions field duplication — it duplicates top/minLogDice/maxPerRelation from ExplorationOptions

clusters.name: low-level-elegance
clusters.description: Fix low_level_elegance issues — hardcoded result limits inconsistency, writer=null sentinel, showUsage println sprawl

clusters.name: design-debt
clusters.description: Fix design_coherence and initialization_coupling issues — handler asymmetry, constructor I/O coupling

clusters.name: test-strategy
clusters.description: Fix test_strategy issues — BlackLabDummyTest placeholder, missing integration coverage

clusters.name: p1-contract-fix
clusters.description: Refactor parseBcqlRequest to throw IAE like sibling handlers instead of sending HTTP response and returning null — fixes error_consistency and contract_coherence simultaneously

clusters.name: p1-logic-clarity
clusters.description: Remove dead orElseThrow calls in ExplorationHandlers after resolveRelationConfig already validates, and fix seed parameter mutation in SemanticFieldExplorer

clusters.name: p2-ai-debt
clusters.description: Remove step comments that restate method calls, rewrite Javadoc first sentences that mirror method names, and remove stale @Nullable from getVersion()

clusters.name: p2-abstraction
clusters.description: Remove zero-value delegation wrappers and redundant one-liner methods: SingleSeedExplorationOptions pass-throughs, wrapHandler, toJson() on value objects, RelationPatternBuilder.posGroupFromConstraint

clusters.name: p3-model
clusters.description: Fix ExplorationResult.seed dual-mode comma-encoding and document model/ package boundary between DTOs and classes with logic

clusters.name: p3-api-surface
clusters.description: Align fetchExamples signature to options-object pattern, unify GrammarConfigLoader exception contract, assess handler record asymmetry, and align grammar_config_loader_exception_mismatch

clusters.name: p4-error-misc
clusters.description: Replace broad catch(Exception) in BlackLab init with specific exceptions, and add warning for unrecognised relation_type in GrammarConfigLoader

clusters.name: error-pipeline-bypass
clusters.description: VisualizationHandlers and SketchHandlers bypass wrapWithErrorHandling by calling sendError directly. Fix by throwing the appropriate exceptions instead so the uniform error pipeline handles them.

clusters.name: conllu-converter-cleanup
clusters.description: ConlluConverter.java has three co-located issues: Optional<BufferedWriter> used as mutable state field, implicit invariant never asserted, and long[] with magic index semantics. Fix all three together in one pass.

clusters.name: posgroup-naming
clusters.description: PosGroup.getValue() uses a get-prefix accessor while sibling enums RelationEdgeType and SharingCategory use unprefixed label(). Rename to label() for consistency across the codebase.

clusters.name: p3-deferred
clusters.description: P3 issues deferred for round 24+: mid_level_elegance response assembly spread, contract_coherence mutable collections, test_strategy coverage gaps, type_safety nullable guards, api_surface_coherence /health CORS, design_coherence nouns_per redundancy, incomplete_migration legacy route, naming quality, package_organization, and permanent wontfixes (com.sun API, blacklab raw URL). These do not block score targets for round 23.

clusters.name: handler-quick-wins
clusters.description: Small 2-10 line fixes in api/ handler classes: delete unused DEFAULT constant, extract magic number, add mode validation, merge duplicated request-building helpers, clarify null-init pattern, document param rename, fix exception type, and remove legacy TODO.

clusters.name: dto-and-serializer-moves
clusters.description: Move misplaced classes to their correct packages: QueryResults DTOs to model/, GrammarConfigSerializer to api/, and roundTo2DecimalPlaces to utils/. These are package-organization and high_level_elegance issues.

clusters.name: handler-tests
clusters.description: Add missing unit tests for CorpusQueryHandlers validation paths and Main.java CLI dispatch routing. These are the largest test_strategy gap in the codebase (test_strategy currently at 72.3%).

clusters.name: quick-annotations
clusters.description: Add missing @Nullable annotations and remove trivial Javadocs that restate method names

clusters.name: naming-quality
clusters.description: Rename methods and classes to follow existing conventions and accurately describe behavior

clusters.description: Fix leftover placement issues from the exploration module migration: DTOs, serializers, and Javadoc couplings

clusters.name: error-contract
clusters.description: Fix Javadoc contracts, error messages, deprecation annotations, and silent fallback behaviors to accurately reflect current behavior

clusters.name: p3-refactor

clusters.name: fail-fast-contracts
